text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed


Feedback received: the submitter reported that Aspell builds correctly 
with the default CFLAGS. 

Note: the same kind of problem has been reported with the next release 
and has been fixed upstream. 

See <https://sourceforge.net/tracker/?func=detail&atid=100245&aid=1814706&group_id=245>
